title: Colophon
text: Colophon ePUB based on the html version of Blindsight from Peter Watts' site. Cover by Thomas Pringle from the Lost covers page. URLs are set in Inconsolata by Raph Levien . Converted to ePUB by Ellen Herzfeld . 2011-07-14 Version 1.0 2011-07-15 Version 1.01 Fixed a few note marker glitches in chapter "Notes and references"
